comment: Prototype flow map for the live PenPot instance — consumed by penpot/import/wire-interactions.mjs. Derived from docs/public/research/mvp/design/ux-flows.md journeys, restricted to screens that exist as boards (rpc-verification.json). Light variants are the primary chains; one demonstrative dark chain only.
limitations: Board-level navigation only: boards are PNG-underlay screenshots, so interactions attach to whole boards (single outgoing edge) or to invisible equal-width column hotspot rects named 'proto-hotspot-*' (multiple outgoing edges). Hotspots are NOT aligned to real UI controls.

The 'reprocess' journey (ux-flows §3.1) is a single-screen sub-flow on post-detail (confirm → 409/202 → live pipeline); board-level navigation cannot express a self-loop, so it is recorded but not wired.
The 'messenger-signin' journey (ux-flows §2.1) is a state machine on one screen; only its screen-level hop (settings › messenger accounts → add-channel wizard step 2 in channels) is wireable.
Dark variants are not wired except the demonstrative web/dashboard · dark → web/post-detail · dark hop.

Web boards web/index, web/login, web/skills-manager, web/events-monitor and terminal screens (thread-explorer, research-viewer, assets-browser, billing) have no outgoing edges; index/login are outside the six ux-flows journeys.

journeys.name: add-channel
journeys.note: Add-Channel wizard lives on the Channels screen (wireframes §3.4); after 201 the new channel's threads sync live (thread-explorer).

journeys.name: messenger-signin
journeys.note: Sub-flow of add-channel: Settings › Messenger accounts (§3.11) → continue the wizard (Channels). The sign-in state machine itself is intra-screen.

journeys.name: process-post
journeys.note: Dashboard queue → Post detail processing pipeline (§3.6) → generated research output.

journeys.name: reprocess
journeys.note: NOT WIRED — single-screen sub-flow on web/post-detail (confirm → enqueue → live pipeline / 409 toast); no board-to-board hop exists.

journeys.name: search
journeys.note: Results route to Post OR Asset detail ('results → open Post/Asset'); both branches wired via hotspots on search.

journeys.name: manage-account
journeys.note: Admin home (§3.10) → billing; branch: admin home → white-label branding (Settings §3.11).

journeys.name: dark-demo
journeys.uxFlowsSection: demonstrative dark chain (task-scoped, not a ux-flows journey)
journeys.note: Single demonstrative dark hop: dashboard → post-detail.

journeys.name: mobile-core
journeys.note: Core mobile flow: home feed → channel threads → post detail → media viewer (all boards exist as light variants).
